note: Shipped gen 500 instead of gen 2000 from a paper-2001-strict run. Paper-strict uses unbounded sigma; by gen 850+ the network's tanh outputs saturate to +1 everywhere (score spread collapses to <0.01), making minimax useless. Gen 500 has the strongest position discrimination (fixture-score spread 1.66; max |w| ~19 is still within tanh's useful range).
